prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 75.1 kg; Height 176.9 cm; BMI 24.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 180mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 75.9kg; 9 months ago 72.1kg; 6 months ago 74.2kg; 3 months ago 73.1kg; current 75.1kg), Height (12 months ago 176.9cm; 9 months ago 176.9cm; 6 months ago 176.9cm; 3 months ago 176.9cm; current 176.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 88mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 74mg/g; 9 months ago 68mg/g; 6 months ago 62mg/g; 3 months ago 62mg/g; current 79mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 125mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
